rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings
Assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports belong in component type scopes
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component structure and scope rules during AGREE annex insertion
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Subcomponent ports must be valid in the current scope for AGREE references
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation bindings in component type annexes
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports
